---
title: "DAPR3 flash cards (2026/27)"
---

lorem ipsum


::: {.callout-caution collapse="false"}
#### Find extra content down rabbit holes!

If you want to dive deeper or work toward a more complete understanding of certain topics, we've added **"rabbit holes"** (like this one!) throughout the flash cards.

**We will not assess any content introduced in the rabbit holes.
If you only want to know the basics, you can safely skip them.**
But if you're interested in learning more (or if you find yourself doing more complex data analysis in the future in your minidiss or your diss projects), you might like the extra information.
:::



These flash cards have been developed by [Elizabeth Pankratz](https://edwebprofiles.ed.ac.uk/profile/elizabethpankratz) and [Josiah King](https://edwebprofiles.ed.ac.uk/profile/josiahking) (Josiah drew the cute rabbit!).
